decision.summary: Hold the weekly 64k dip position and open the March 31 $67k dip Yes market.
decision.rationale: The existing weekly position `will-bitcoin-dip-to-64k-march-30-april-5` on `Yes` is at 37.0%, so it is above the 20% stop-loss threshold and far below take-profit, which means no management is needed first. The latest transcript and recent summaries keep Beecthor's thesis bearish after a corrective rebound, with downside targets back through 65.9k and 64k, and Binance at 67653.65 after rejection from the 68.4k area still fits that execution reality. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest daily bearish strike below price is `will-bitcoin-dip-to-67k-on-march-31`, and its 69.0% Yes probability is inside the preferred range; the nearest weekly bearish strike, 66k, is already too aggressively priced at 86.0%, so the daily 67k market is the cleanest new entry. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.

details.market: Will Bitcoin dip to $67,000 on March 31?
